values.content:
=Analyze this vehicle-related receipt, invoice, or document and extract expense information. Return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown formatting or code blocks.

This could be: a fuel slip, vehicle service invoice, tyre receipt, insurance document, toll receipt, licence renewal, parking ticket, or rental contract.

Extract these fields:
- vendor: Name of the business/vendor
- date: Date of the transaction (format: YYYY-MM-DD)
- amount: Total amount paid (number only, no currency symbols)
- category: One of: Fuel, Service, Tyres, Insurance, Toll, Licence, Parking, Other
- litres: Litres of fuel (if fuel receipt, number only)
- price_per_litre: Price per litre (if fuel receipt, number only)
- odometer_km: Odometer reading if shown (number only)
- description: Brief description of the expense

If this is a rental contract, also extract:
- rental_start: Start date of rental (format: YYYY-MM-DD)
- rental_end: End date of rental (format: YYYY-MM-DD)
- rental_total: Total rental cost (number only)
- vehicle_make: Vehicle make
- vehicle_model: Vehicle model
- vehicle_year: Vehicle year
- vehicle_registration: Registration/licence plate number

If a field is not found or unclear, use null.
For amounts, use numbers only (no currency symbols).
Currency is assumed ZAR unless otherwise stated.

Return JSON:
{"vendor": "string or null", "date": "YYYY-MM-DD or null", "amount": number or null, "category": "Fuel|Service|Tyres|Insurance|Toll|Licence|Parking|Other", "litres": number or null, "price_per_litre": number or null, "odometer_km": number or null, "description": "string or null", "rental_start": "YYYY-MM-DD or null", "rental_end": "YYYY-MM-DD or null", "rental_total": number or null, "vehicle_make": "string or null", "vehicle_model": "string or null", "vehicle_year": number or null, "vehicle_registration": "string or null", "confidence": number between 0 and 100, "notes": "string or null"}
